untranslatable_reason: Pattern identification for Right-Angled and Descending Broadening Formations requires visual pattern recognition (trendline convergence/divergence analysis) not available in allowed indicators. Target price computation is AUTHOR_SILENT. Success rates, average rise/decline percentages, failure rates, volume trends, and throwback/pullback percentages are all AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be quantified into rules. Breakout direction is BOTH (CONTEXT_DEPENDENT) which requires dynamic logic. Used Donchian channels as proxy for breakout detection, but this does not capture the specific geometric structure of the RABD pattern.
translation_notes: Signal requires pattern recognition beyond technical indicators. Attempted to model breakout behavior using Donchian channels as a proxy for upper/lower boundary breaks, with stop-loss at opposite boundary. However, the core RABD pattern identification—which depends on visual trendline analysis and specific geometric properties—cannot be expressed with the allowed indicator set. Manual chart review recommended for pattern confirmation.
